actFast: 271 Grey Silo Rd was listed 2 days ago and B - 630 Pinerow Cres just 1 day ago. Both are brand new, worth calling immediately despite their tradeoffs.
The Laurelwood 5-bedroom and the Columbia Hills 4-bedroom houses are both tagged NEW on Kijiji. Private-landlord listings like these move fast once the address is shared.
457 Dansbury Dr was listed only 9 days ago and is priced under market for 5 bedrooms. MLS rentals like this typically lease within 2 to 4 weeks.
105 Marshall St is available immediately with a first-month promo, which means the landlord wants it filled now. If the group wants it for September, call soon and negotiate the start date.
scenarioANote: After a deep second pass across Kijiji's sublet categories, Reddit, Facebook-indexed search, and every purpose-built student housing company on the list, genuine whole-group 4-month leases (September to December 2026) are essentially not on the market yet. The only verified 4-month whole-unit sublet found is a 2-bedroom apartment near ION Allen station, too small for a 5-6 person group. This matches how the Waterloo co-op sublet market actually works: departing co-op students almost always sublet their own single room individually rather than a group vacating a whole house at once, and most fall-term sublet posts do not appear until August as people confirm their own work terms. Rather than force a match, this pass instead flagged the 10 strongest Scenario B listings worth a direct call to ask if the landlord will shorten the term to 4 months (see the badges below); private landlords with several properties, such as UWrent and the Laurelwood and Churchill Crescent listers, are the best odds. The daily refresh will keep watching for genuine Scenario A postings as August approaches.

sourceCoverage.result: Strongest source across both passes: 12 whole-house/townhome listings with verified detail pages, from Central Waterloo to Vista Hills and Grey Silo
